us_agent.narrative_en: SPY bounced to $670.79 but RSI at 31.8 is approaching oversold. Still below SMA20 and SMA60, trend is down. VIX eased to 22.4 but Gold at $5,003 shows smart money still hedging. No Fed relief at 4.20% yield.
us_agent.narrative_tw: SPY 小幅反彈至 $670.79，RSI 31.8 接近超賣區。仍在 SMA20 和 SMA60 下方，趨勢向下。VIX 降至 22.4 但黃金仍在 $5,003，聰明錢持續避險。10Y 殖利率 4.20%，聯準會沒有降息跡象。
key_factors_en: RSI 31.8 near oversold (<30) — tactical bounce zone
SPY below SMA20 ($680) and SMA60 ($686) — downtrend intact
key_factors_tw: RSI 31.8 接近超賣 (<30) — 歷史上常見反彈區
SPY 低於 SMA20 ($680) 和 SMA60 ($686) — 下降趨勢未破
黃金 $5,003 — 避險需求不減，結構性恐懼
us_agent.watch_for_en: SPY needs to reclaim SMA20 ($680) to confirm reversal. If RSI breaks below 30, watch for capitulation volume.
us_agent.watch_for_tw: SPY 需站回 SMA20 ($680) 才能確認反轉。若 RSI 跌破 30，留意是否出現投降式大量。
us_agent.forward_outlook_en: Base case: SPY +1% to +4% over 20 days (73% win rate at this GRISI level). Bounce likely sold into — no catalyst for sustained rally.
us_agent.forward_outlook_tw: 基本情境：SPY 20天 +1% 到 +4%（此 GRISI 水平歷史勝率 73%）。反彈可能被拋售 — 缺乏持續上漲催化劑。

tw_agent.narrative_en: Biggest change today: foreign investors flipped to buying (+4.7B TWD) after 3 consecutive days of selling (-438B). TAIEX rebounded to 33,837 (+1.5%), TSMC back to 1,870. Margin growth slowed to +1.87% (vs +3.42% last week) — retail chasing momentum is weakening.
tw_agent.narrative_tw: 今天最大變化：外資轉買了！從連賣3天 -438億到今天淨買 +4.7億，方向翻轉。大盤反彈至 33,837(+1.5%)，台積電回 1870。融資5天增速放緩至 +1.87%(上週 +3.42%)，散戶追高力道減弱。
key_factors_en: Foreign investors flipped: -438B selling → +4.7B buying (source: FinMind/TWSE)
Margin growth slowing: 5d +1.87% vs last week's +3.42%
key_factors_tw: 外資翻多：連賣3天 -438億 → 今天淨買 +4.7億（來源：FinMind/TWSE）
融資增速放緩：5天 +1.87% vs 上週 +3.42%
tw_agent.watch_for_en: Need foreign investors to buy 3+ consecutive days to confirm trend reversal. TSMC margin still +20% monthly — retail risk elevated.
tw_agent.watch_for_tw: 觀察外資能否連買 3 天以上，確認趨勢性轉變。台積電融資月增 20% 仍高，散戶風險未解。
tw_agent.forward_outlook_en: Short-term neutral to cautiously optimistic. Three signals improving: foreign buying, TAIEX above SMA20, margin growth slowing. But TSMC margin +20% is still elevated risk.
tw_agent.forward_outlook_tw: 短期偏中性轉樂觀。三個信號好轉：外資翻多、大盤站回均線、融資增速放緩。但台積電融資月增 20% 仍是風險。

summary.cross_market_view_en: US still fearful (31.5) but TW warming up (44.2). Divergence at 12.7 — foreign investors buying TW while US remains technically weak. Historically, US fear + TW neutral suggests global risk persists but Asia may lead the bounce.
summary.cross_market_view_tw: 美股仍偏恐懼 (31.5) 但台股回溫 (44.2)。分歧擴大至 12.7 — 外資買台股但美股技術面仍弱。歷史上此組合意味全球風險仍在，但亞洲可能領先反彈。
summary.actionable_en: HOLD — US approaching oversold but reversal not confirmed. TW foreign buying is positive but needs 3+ days to confirm. Wait for confirmation before entering.
summary.actionable_tw: 觀望 — 美股接近超賣但未確認反轉。台股外資翻多是正面信號但需連買 3 天以上確認。不急進場，等確認。

thresholds_en.us_buy: Below 30 (Fear) — historically +1.70% / 20d, 67% win. Below 15 (Extreme Fear) — +4.17%, 72% win. Currently 2.4 pts from Fear.
thresholds_en.us_sell: US greed sell signal is WEAK — even at score >70, SPY still averages +2.03%. US structural bull market overrides retail greed. Use TW greed as Asia sell proxy instead.
thresholds_en.tw_buy: Below 30 (Fear) — historically +1.90% / 20d, 75% win. Below 15 (Extreme Fear) — +6.45%, 87% win. Currently 9.9 pts from Fear.
thresholds_en.tw_sell: Above 70 (Greed) — historically +0.16% / 20d, only 53% win. Above 85 (Euphoria) — NEGATIVE -1.13%. Reduce TW exposure when score >70.

thresholds_tw.us_buy: 低於 30 (恐懼) — 歷史報酬 +1.70% / 20天, 67%勝率。低於 15 (極度恐懼) — +4.17%, 72%勝率。目前距離 Fear 還有 2.4 分。
thresholds_tw.us_sell: 美股貪婪賣出信號較弱 — 即使分數 >70，SPY 仍平均漲 +2.03%。美股結構性牛市壓過散戶貪婪。可用台股貪婪作為亞洲賣出參考。
thresholds_tw.tw_buy: 低於 30 (恐懼) — 歷史報酬 +1.90% / 20天, 75%勝率。低於 15 (極度恐懼) — +6.45%, 87%勝率。目前距離 Fear 還有 9.9 分。
thresholds_tw.tw_sell: 高於 70 (貪婪) — 歷史報酬僅 +0.16%, 53%勝率。高於 85 (極度貪婪) — 負報酬 -1.13%。分數 >70 時建議減碼台股。
